title: SANCTUARY PROMISE HOTLINE - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE SANCTUARY PROMISE HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Tracks and reports sanctuary promise violations. Provides victim and witness support, information, and a referral hotline. The Oregon Department of Justice (ODOJ) may open an investigation into reported sanctuary promise law violations. Hotline advocates do not control the outcome of ODOJ investigations or decisions to sanction a perpetrator of a violation. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (884) 924-7829 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (884) 924-7829 Español (884) 629-7276 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices * Immigration Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Immigration Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - SEARCH OREGON CHARITIES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - CONSUMER PROTECTION LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - CRIME VICTIM AND SURVIVOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - NON-EMERGENCY BIAS RESPONSE HOTLINE LEGAL SERVICES - OREGON CHILD SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE
